Mobile Auto Detailing · Independence & Manchester, IA

Ceramic
Coating

The most advanced paint protection available. Long-lasting, hydrophobic, and stunning. Starting at $300.

Book Now Call (319) 327-7939

What Is Ceramic Coating?

Protect Your Investment.

Ceramic coating is a liquid polymer that chemically bonds to your vehicle's clear coat and creates a long-lasting, durable protective layer. Unlike wax or sealants that wear off in weeks, a properly applied ceramic coating can last years with the right maintenance.

The result is a hydrophobic surface that repels water, dirt, and contaminants — keeping your car cleaner longer and making it much easier to wash. Your paint is also protected against UV damage, chemical etching, and light scratches.

Starting at $300
Price varies by vehicle size

Benefits

Why Ceramic Coating?

💧

Hydrophobic Protection

Water beads up and rolls off, taking dirt and contaminants with it. Your car stays cleaner longer.

☀️

UV Protection

Guards against oxidation and paint fade caused by Iowa sun and weather.

🛡️

Chemical Resistance

Protects against bird droppings, tree sap, road salt, and other damaging chemicals.

✨

Enhanced Gloss

Adds incredible depth and clarity to your paint for a showroom-quality finish.

🔧

Easy Maintenance

Future washes are faster and easier — dirt doesn't stick like it used to.

📅

Long-Lasting

Unlike wax, a properly applied coating can last years with proper care.

Important: Do Paint Correction First

Ceramic coating permanently locks in whatever is on your paint underneath it — including swirl marks and scratches. If your paint has defects, they'll be sealed in forever under the coating.

We strongly recommend doing a paint correction before any ceramic coating application. This ensures the coating goes on over flawless paint for the best possible appearance and protection.

Learn About Paint Correction →
